summary: Completed comprehensive testing of real-time multiplayer chess web app. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI loads correctly with all required components. Minor issues with chess move interaction and chat send button due to overlay interference.

ui_bugs.issue: Send message button not clickable due to 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay intercepting pointer events

integration_issues.issue: Chess square clicks (e2-e4 move) may not be registering properly - moves not appearing in move history

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/ returns server running message
Backend API: GET /api/room/{roomId} returns room state with FEN, turn, status
Backend API: GET /api/room/nonexistent returns exists: false
Backend API: CORS headers properly configured
Frontend: Home page loads with create game button and room code input
Frontend: Create new game navigates to /game/:roomId
Frontend: Username modal appears with correct data-testid attributes
Frontend: Username input and join room button work correctly
Frontend: Game page loads with chess board, game status, room ID badge
Frontend: Chat and Moves tabs are present and clickable
Frontend: Player info components display correctly
Frontend: Reset game button is present
Frontend: Back to home navigation works
Frontend: Join room with room code functionality works
Frontend: Socket.IO connection establishes (system messages appear)
Frontend: Chat input accepts text and send button exists

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - UI loads correctly, minor interaction issues with chess moves and chat overlay

action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix chess square click detection - moves are not registering when clicking on chess squares (e2-e4 test failed). 2. Fix chat send button overlay issue - 'Made with Emergent' badge is intercepting pointer events. 3. Verify Socket.IO move events are properly handled on frontend.
